% pciconf -lv

sdhci_pci0@pci0:2:0:0:  class=0x088001 card=0x21f617aa chip=0xe8231180 rev=0x05 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Ricoh Co Ltd'
    device     = 'PCIe SDXC/MMC Host Controller'
    class      = base peripheral

How-To-Repeat: Do suspend/resume and insert SD card into the card reader.
